name: Nanfang Communication Holdings Limited
summary: Nanfang Communication Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells optical fiber cables and optical distribution network devices in the People's Republic of China. Its customers primarily include national and regional telecommunications network operators and telecommunications supporting services providers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Changzhou, the People's Republic of China. Nanfang Communication Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Pacific Mind Development Limited.
